name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️GG Marmont Mini Shoulder Bag. The GG Marmont chain strap mini shoulder bag features a structured soft shape and an oversized flap closure, with GG metal hardware. The sliding chain shoulder strap has multiple carrying methods, allowing for free switching between shoulder and hand carry. It features wavy quilted leather with a GG logo on the back. Wavy quilted leather with a GG logo, retro gold-tone metal hardware with double G, sliding chain strap adjustable to a shoulder strap height of 55cm, or a top handle height of 30cm. Can also be used as a crossbody bag. Spring buckle flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
